reason: The candidate correctly states the §412 rule: statutory damages/fees require registration before infringement began or within 3 months of first publication. It then applies this to the timeline (mid-January publication, current date July 5, so ~6 months have passed, past the 3-month window), concluding statutory damages are likely lost but actual damages/profits and injunctive relief remain available — this matches the reference's conditional logic precisely (within window → damages preserved; past window → only actual damages). The core legal fact and its application align with the reference.
